meanings.definition: having come or been brought to a conclusion
examples: the affair is over, ended, finished
the wallpaper was covered all over with flowers
everything was dusted over with a fine layer of soot

meanings.definition: to or in any or all places; ; ; ; ; (`everyplace' is used informally for `everywhere')
examples: You find fast food stores everywhere
people everywhere are becoming aware of the problem
he carried a gun everywhere he went
looked all over for a suitable gift
